title: Donald Trump Promised UFO Disclosure — Why the Pentagon Is Allegedly Still Hiding Files
description: Donald Trump said US agencies should release UFO records, but weeks later no files have surfaced and the Pentagon's review process appears to be moving at its usual glacial pace.

title: FBI Hunt Missing UFO General Neil McCasland Amid 'Grave National Security Crisis'
description: The FBI has joined the search for retired US Air Force Major General William Neil McCasland, 68, who has been missing in Albuquerque since Feb. 27, 2026 and linked to decades of classified American defence research.

title: UFO Row Erupts As US Congressman Claims Intel Insider Warned He Could Be Killed For Probing Alien Secrets
description: A UFO row erupts as US congressman claims an intelligence insider warned he could be killed for probing alien secrets, sparking renewed public debate.

title: Retired General With UFO Expertise Missing, Sparking National Security Concerns
description: A retired Air Force major general, William Neil McCasland, known for his expertise in UFOs and classified space programs, has gone missing, prompting a 'grave national security crisis'. The disappearance in Albuquerque, New Mexico, has involved the FBI, and a Silver Alert has been issued. His disappearance is particularly concerning due to his access to sensitive information and potential medical issues.

title: I quit UK police to become UFO hunter – Trump must blow lid off alien secrets with ‘out of this world’ revelations
description: A FORMER UK cop who now cracks UFO cases hopes Donald Trump will blow the lid off top alien secrets. Gary Heseltine, 65, who took early retirement in 2013 to become a full-time UFO detective, is hoping the real X-files will reveal "out of this world" revelations - but is remaining slightly cautious. It comes...
